mnemonics.title: Control Plane Components
mnemonics.content: CASSETTE CC: API Server, Scheduler, Controller Manager, etcd, Cloud Controller Manager

visualTips.visualization: Master node as brain, worker nodes as arms holding Pod containers
Pods as apartments sharing building (node) utilities with unique IPs

analogies.analogy: Like a music conductor managing orchestra (Pods) versions and scaling
Acts like restaurant host directing customers (traffic) to tables (Pods)
